    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>22</var>, <var data-var='time'>17:28</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Identified</strong> - The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>22</var>, <var data-var='time'>17:27</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Investigating</strong> - We are investigating an outage affecting features such as document creation in claude.ai, Cowork Remote, Claude Code, Claude Code on the Web, Claude Tag, and Claude Design </p></content>
